title: Pacific's Specifics
description: This is a addon to "Cosmic Horizons" that adds some crafting recipes for the steel, titanium, and nickel and makes it possible to play in survival!
body:
Pacific's Specifics adds crafting recipes to the items that Cosmic Horizons adds and also creates more blocks for you to use in outer space! Not only does it add crafting recipes but will soon have full survival compatability with [Cosmic Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmic-horizons-cosmos). Make sure to use [CH Remade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ch-remade) with this mod for the best experience!

New Blocks
